title: Franklin Templeton Calls Agentic AI Next 'Killer' Use Case for Blockchain
summary: Franklin Templeton's digital assets lead said that the autonomous AI agent economy will increase demand for blockchain protocols hosting machine-to-machine micropayments.
body:
Franklin Templeton, a global investment management firm, has identified agentic AI as the next 'killer' use case for blockchain technology. The firm's digital assets lead stated that the rise of autonomous AI agents will drive demand for blockchain protocols capable of facilitating machine-to-machine micropayments.

The idea is that AI agents will need to transact with each other seamlessly, and blockchain's decentralized and secure nature makes it ideal for this purpose. This could lead to a surge in the use of blockchain technology beyond just cryptocurrencies, potentially integrating it into various sectors like finance, healthcare, and supply chain management.

For everyday people, this means that blockchain technology could become more prevalent in their daily lives. As AI agents handle more tasks, from managing investments to coordinating logistics, the underlying blockchain infrastructure will become more visible and crucial. This could lead to more efficient and transparent transactions, benefiting consumers and businesses alike.

Looking ahead, investors and tech enthusiasts should watch for developments in AI-agent economies and blockchain protocols that support these interactions. The integration of these technologies could unlock new opportunities and use cases, making blockchain an even more essential part of the digital landscape. Read more → https://cointelegraph.com/news/agentic-ai-killer-use-case-blockchain-franklin-templeton?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound
twitterThread: AI agents could make blockchain the backbone of machine-to-machine payments, says Franklin Templeton. This could change how we transact digitally.
The idea is simple: AI agents will need to pay each other for services, and blockchain is perfect for secure, decentralized transactions. This could make blockchain tech more mainstream.

If you're into tech or investing, keep an eye on AI-agent economies and blockchain protocols. This could be the next big thing. Read more → https://www.cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-07-22-franklin-templeton-sees-ai-agents-as-next-big-blockchain-driver
standaloneTweet: Franklin Templeton says AI agents will drive demand for blockchain micropayments, making blockchain tech more integral to our digital lives. Keep an eye on this trend!
